relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains customer product holdings and account data (balances, transactions, credit limits), while the outbound file contains marketing offer scripts for customer service delivery. There is no meaningful field overlap; the outbound file's structure (offer scripts with content, call-to-action, delivery channels) cannot be reasonably derived from the inbound schema (account holdings and balances). These represent fundamentally different data domains: one is transactional account data, the other is marketing collateral.
